j=function(...)return h(y,{...},b,S)end return j end,function(y,b)local S=R(b)local j=function(j,G,w,c)return h(y,{j,G,w;c},b,S)end return j end return(o(-1000212+17226991,{}))(S(p))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[b(-249520-(-214761))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
